arts.ttl: Player becomes hero after difficult period following collapse of transfer to Leeds United
arts.sum: Leeds United were keen on signing 1. FC Koln’s Dejan Ljubicic in the summer window, but the deal didn’t go through. The midfielder was determined to join Leeds and was pushing for a move to Elland Road. The transfer eventually collapsed after Daniel Farke’s side pulled the plug because the price was doubled and many The post Player becomes hero after difficult period following collapse of transfer to Leeds United appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Leeds United’s new “official stance” may suggest what happens with Red Bull-linked ace
arts.sum: Leeds United are expecting a quiet January window when the new year rolls around, pertaining to both incomings and outgoings. The Whites have six games left in 2024, and there is already one eye on what the new year might bring, but it’s not going to be a busy period in January – according to the club and Farke.

arts.ttl: Leeds United's unspoken dominant quality, Daniel Farke's surprise pressure and new manager quip
arts.sum: The Derby boss may find himself under a little pressure if his side slide closer to the relegation zone after four games without a win and successive league defats, but he does not expect any pressure to be coming the way of Farke. While the expectation is on third-placed Leeds to return to winning ways against the Rams, Warne says the pressure is nothing new for Leeds' players and manager Daniel Farke, who he says he cannot believe will be under any pressure given the job he is currently doing.

arts.ttl: Ex-Leeds United chief Andrea Radrizzani 'set' to win takeover battle with Nottingham Forest owner
arts.sum: Former Leeds United owner Andrea Radrizzani is believed to be in advanced talks to buy a controlling stake in Vasco Da Gama. Multiple reports claim the former Whites supremo, who sold the club to 49ers Enterprises last year, is winning his battle to beat Nottingham Forest owner Evangelos Marinakis to the purchase of the Brazilian club.

arts.ttl: Leeds United vs Derby County: Old foes meet after five years
arts.sum: Leeds United’s pursuit of a coveted Premier League return continues on Saturday with a must-win home encounter against Championship underachievers Derby County. Back to the home comforts of Elland Road following a gut-wrenching 1-0 defeat at Blackburn Rovers, Daniel Farke’s men seek a way back to the win column against out-of-form opposition.

arts.ttl: Leeds United set to hit new level with massive new update from Farke
arts.sum: Leeds United midfielder Ethan Ampadu has returned to team training this month with the club captain primed for a return to the starting lineup in the very near future. Great news for Leeds, though, comes in the form of Ethan Ampadu being back in full team training, as Farke said (via the YEP ):

arts.ttl: Leeds United keen on bargain right-back – New scouting area for Whites could produce transfer
arts.sum: Leeds United are in the picture to sign Mamelodi Sundowns’ Khuliso Mudau, according to a report from South Africa. The right-back has been with the South African side since 2020 and has been a regular for them, making 133 appearances so far. arts.ttl: 'Strange things happen' Leeds United January transfer promise can't be made
arts.sum: A marquee new signing at Leeds United in the January transfer window could not be ruled out by Daniel Farke in Thursday’s press conference. Asked if he could categorically rule out a marquee signing at Elland Road, he said: “No. So, in general, I’m long enough in this business I know, sometimes, strange things can happen.
